title: The Ghost in the Garret
actors: Dorothy Gish, Downing Clarke, Mrs. David Landau
plot: Framed for stealing some pearls while staying at the country home of her aunt and uncle, Mr. and Mrs. Dennison, Delsie O'Dell ( Dorothy Gish ) is banished from their house. Delsie along with her bulldog, Violet, follows Oscar, the...
